members.error: validation failed twice: weaknesses item invalid

strengths: src/utils/permissions.ts validates file paths against sensitive-path allowlist before operations, blocking obvious traversal attempts.
src/utils/kill_switch.ts uses Windows ESC key binding for abort, reducing reliance on catchable signals.
scripts/ entry points are isolated from package.json, limiting direct dependency injection attacks.
hermes_watcher.ts fetches from public GitHub API only; no credential exposure in release-watch mechanism.
Minimal third-party runtime deps reduces supply-chain attack surface.
src/utils/runner.ts synchronous execution model prevents concurrent process races in single-threaded context.
weaknesses: scripts/a4_run.ts hardcodes Windows paths (C:\Users\angel\...) as untrusted input vector; if scripts/ accepts external task configs, malicious paths bypass portable validation.
src/utils/runner.ts execSync spawns child processes with no timeout; LLM-generated commands that hang freeze entire agent runtime indefinitely.
src/utils/kill_switch.ts spawns PowerShell without timeout; if script hangs, child process survives abort attempt, risking resource leaks.
scripts/a4_run.ts silently catches JSON.parse errors with empty blocks; corrupted LLM output masquerades as valid, leading to undetected state corruption.
missions/ directory unreadable (90s timeout); mission execution logic—where LLM commands likely execute—is completely unaudited for injection or traversal.
src/utils/permissions.ts mixes Unix/Windows sensitive paths inconsistently; cross-platform config reuse could allow traversal on non-native OS branch.
recommendations: Refactor scripts/a4_run.ts to use os.homedir() + path.join() instead of hardcoded C:\ paths; validate all file operations against src/utils/permissions.ts allowlist.
Add 30-second timeout to src/utils/runner.ts execSync calls; reject commands that exceed timeout with explicit error log identifying the frozen command.
Add 10-second timeout to src/utils/kill_switch.ts PowerShell spawn; log PID on timeout and emit abort signal to parent for forced cleanup.
Replace empty catch blocks in scripts/a4_run.ts with logged parse errors (include raw input snippet); reject malformed JSON rather than silencing it.
Audit missions/ directory security: confirm all LLM output in mission tasks passes through src/utils/permissions.ts path validation and src/utils/runner.ts command checks.
Normalize src/utils/permissions.ts sensitive-path list to platform-specific subsets at runtime; use process.platform to select Unix vs. Windows entries to avoid cross-platform bypass.
